package rulecoverage

func PositiveTestsCoupleToGormModelForApiContractAssertions() string {
    ruleID := "tests_couple_to_gorm_model_for_api_contract_assertions"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "API tests that assert persistence model shapes instead of response contracts."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
